title: Ammophobia (Quicksand)
description: A mod about quicksands, with four different variants that spawn all around the world.
body:
# Ammophobia
**This mod add four Quicksand variants; Sand, Red Sand, Tar and Sculk.**
- Quicksand pits spawn in the desert, covering a lot of the terrain.
- Red Quicksand pits spawn in the badlands, and are a lot rarer to come across.
- Tar pits spawn in the mangrove swamp, they often generate underneath the trees or right by a hill.
- Sculk pits spawn inside and around the deep dark, they are rare to find as they spawn within the cave walls. They generate the most inside and around Ancient Cities.

All quicksands can be countered with chainmail boots.
